focalfunc: func RunSyncdb(name string, force bool, verbose bool) error
funcbody:
func RunSyncdb(name string, force bool, verbose bool) error {
	BootStrap()

	al := getDbAlias(name)
	cmd := new(commandSyncDb)
	cmd.al = al
	cmd.force = force
	cmd.noInfo = !verbose
	cmd.verbose = verbose
	cmd.rtOnError = true
	return cmd.Run()
}
